title: Google Sheets filter returns empty results
symptom: When filtering data by email in Google Sheets, the filter returns nothing if the email does not exist, causing issues in the IF node.
not_this_if: Email exists in the Google Sheets
root_cause: The Google Sheets node does not output any data when the filter criteria do not match any records. This results in an empty array or undefined output, which cannot be evaluated in subsequent nodes like the IF node.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets node settings
Use the IF node to check if the {{ $json }} object is empty
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always output data' in the Google Sheets node settings to handle empty results.
